title: englerastrum scandens
intro: Englerastrum scandens, also known as the climbing passion flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Passifloraceae. The medicinal properties of Englerastrum scandens are attributed to its flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. This plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and insomnia, and has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Englerastrum scandens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
